'''Ganza Park''' was a park located in the [[Historical District]] of [[Estalle]], a [[City/Legends|city]] found on [[Estalle Island]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Procopia/Legends|Procopia]]. The park consisted of a large preserve made up of rock and flower gardens, rolling hills and isolated groups of trees. By the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the area was some of the most undeveloped and valuable real estate on all of Estalle island. By this time a large [[Tea/Legends|tea]] house named the [[Greenhouse]] had opened within the park. Built with a view of the [[Ocean/Legends|sea]], the tea house was considered a highlight of the preserve.<ref name="LotE" />

==Behind the scenes==
Ganza park was first mentioned in the campaign guide included in ''[[Lords of the Expanse]]'', a [[1997]] supplement written by [[Paul Sudlow]] and [[Chris Doyle]] for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' by [[West End Games]].
